title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Wockhardt Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
